## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproducible example

Please include a minimal reproducible example (MRE).

```r
library(milt)

# Your code here
```

## Expected behaviour

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened? Include the full error message and traceback if applicable.

```
# Paste error output here
```

## Session info

Please paste the output of `sessionInfo()` or `devtools::session_info()`.

```
# Paste session info here
```

## Additional context

Add any other context (data characteristics, OS, R version, etc.) here.
